summary: Comprehensive testing of GST verification API (Sandbox.co.in), RFQ lead form, and regression tests. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/gst/verify with valid GSTIN '27AASCS2460H1Z0' returns valid=true with legal_name (SHIV SAGAR FOODS AND RESORTS PRIVATE LIMITED)
POST /api/gst/verify with invalid GSTIN returns valid=false
POST /api/enquiries/rfq-lead creates enquiry and returns success with ID
POST /api/enquiries/rfq-lead with missing required fields returns 400
POST /api/enquiries/rfq-lead with minimal data (name, phone, email) succeeds
Frontend: Homepage 'Request a Quote' button opens RFQ modal
Frontend: RFQ modal has all fields (name, phone, gst, company, email, fabric_type dropdown)
Frontend: GST Verify button calls API and shows 'GST verified successfully!' toast
Frontend: Company name auto-populated from GST verification (SHIV SAGAR FOODS AND RESORTS PRIVATE LIMITED)
Frontend: Form submission shows success toast 'Your enquiry has been submitted!'
Frontend: Modal closes after successful submission
Frontend: Admin login at /admin/login works and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Vendor login at /vendor/login works and redirects to dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: GST verification using Sandbox.co.in API is properly implemented with 2-step auth flow (authenticate -> search GSTIN)
RFQ lead endpoint correctly saves to DB, sends email via Resend, and pushes to campaigns.locofast.com/api/leads
Frontend properly handles GST verification state with loading indicator, success checkmark, and error messages
Company name auto-population from GST works correctly using trade_name || legal_name fallback
seed_data_creation: Test RFQ leads created during testing (TEST_RFQ_User, TEST_Minimal_User)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST verification API (Sandbox.co.in) and RFQ lead form fully tested and working. Valid test GSTIN: 27AASCS2460H1Z0 (Shiv Sagar Foods). RFQ form on homepage replaces old /rfq page link. Email sent to marketing@locofast.com via Resend API. Leads pushed to campaigns.locofast.com/api/leads.

gst_verification.valid_gstin_response: Returns valid=true with legal_name, trade_name, business_type, gst_status, address details

frontend_rfq_modal.trigger: Request a Quote button on homepage
frontend_rfq_modal.gst_verify_flow: Enter 15-char GSTIN -> Click Verify -> API call -> Auto-populate company name
